message:
refactor: remove decision_seq and replay_hash from TraceData::Worker

Strip the `decision_seq` and `replay_hash` fields from the Worker
variant in EventDataSnapshot, its From<TraceData> impl, and the
TraceEventSummary formatter in determinism.rs.

NOTE: test assertions at state.rs:7179-7180 have incomplete
`assert_eq!` calls that will fail to compile — the field values
were removed but the assertion lines were not fully cleaned up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
